---
title: "SelectionPanelShell.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/SelectionPanelShell.tsx"
loc: 42
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.00
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 3.90
overall_score: 4.55
---

## Intent
React component rendering SelectionPanelShell.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <SelectionPanelShell /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [SelectionPanel](file://./SelectionPanel.tsx)
- [TrajectoryList](file://./TrajectoryList.tsx)
- [SectorMetrics](file://./SectorMetrics.tsx)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Trajectory](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `SelectionPanelShell`
- `SelectionPanelShell`
- `filename`
